tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: All I Want For Christmas Is You

recommended.version_description: These are the chords for Taylor Swift's new song "Gorgeous" from her album "reputation".

content:
I tabbed this out as a beginner's solo acoustic.  Feel free to use as a template (:.

Standard Tuning
Capo 2

[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]EM[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] x3

[PRE-CHORUS] :

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                                            [ch]A[/ch]
Shawty Imma only tell you this once, you the illest [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                                                         [ch]A[/ch]
And for your lovin' Imma Die Hard like Bruce Willis [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
You got spark, you, you got spunk[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You, you got something all the girls want[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
You're like a candy store[/tab]
And I'm a toddler,
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You got me wantin' more and mo mo more of[/tab]

Anyway I think I met him sometime before[/tab]

In a different life or where I record[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
I mean he was Adam, I think I was Eve[/tab]

But my vision ends with the apple on the tree[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Cause I'm the one like I'm Tracy McGrady[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
And I think I love him like Eminem call us Shady[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
When he call me mama, I call him baby[/tab]
